message.content:
**The Anthropic Max 20x subscription ($200/month) is available to any individual user via web or mobile app, with no specific eligibility requirements beyond payment and a standard account.**[1][2][3][5]

It provides 20 times the usage limits of the Pro plan ($20/month), ideal for heavy users, with weekly limits across all models and Sonnet models resetting every 7 days.[1][2][4] Pricing is monthly only, prorated on upgrades, and web-only at $200 (mobile may vary); no free trial, minimum commitment, or sharing with teams.[1][2][5]

**Context window details**: No search results confirm a **1M context window** eligibility tied to Max 20x for 2025-2026. Max plans offer higher usage and features like conversation memory or early access, but context windows are model-specific (e.g., Sonnet/Opus), not explicitly expanded to 1M tokens for this tier.[3]

**Claude Cowork access** (requiring Max): Needs latest Claude Desktop app on macOS (Windows soon), stable internet, and Max 5x ($100) or 20x—no Pro/Team/Enterprise support yet.[2][5] Pro users access basic Cowork since January 16, 2026, but hit limits faster.[2]

| Tier | Price (web, monthly) | Usage Multiplier vs Pro | Best For |
|------|----------------------|--------------------------|----------|
| Max 5x | $100 | 5x | Moderate heavy use |
| **Max 20x** | **$200** | **20x (~900+ messages/5 hours)** | **Full-time, intensive work** |[1][2][4][5]

Upgrades from Pro/Max 5x are prorated; credits apply if switching from annual Pro with matching billing address.[1] No educational/nonprofit discounts announced.[5]
